message:
fix(tests): update e2e_orphans test assertions for bd format parity

The orphans command now outputs "✓ No orphaned issues found" (matching
bd format) but tests expected "No orphan issues found". Updated three
test assertions to use substring match "No orphan" to accommodate both
formats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
